directive.title: Basic RFQ API endpoints with Neon integration

auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid foundation with proper types, Zod schemas, database schema, and query functions, but critically fails to deliver the core API route files (src/app/api/rfqs/route.ts and src/app/api/rfqs/[id]/route.ts) that are the primary deliverable of the directive. Additionally, there are critical buildability issues: missing dependencies (decimal.js, @neondatabase/serverless) not in package.json, and a missing file (src/lib/audit/rfq-audit.ts) that is imported but not generated. The code also uses 'any' types in several places. Without the API route files, none of the acceptance criteria can be fully satisfied. The build cannot compile or deploy in its current state.

top_issues.description: Required API route file for GET and POST /api/rfqs was not generated. This is a core requirement of the directive.
Required API route file for GET and PUT /api/rfqs/[id] was not generated. This is a core requirement of the directive.
Imports '@neondatabase/serverless' which is NOT listed in package.json dependencies. This will cause a build failure.
